English:
Instant, Private, and Seamless File Sharing. A lightweight Windows desktop application for secure session-based file sharing across devices. Upload files on one device, scan a QR code, and download them on another — no accounts, no tracking, just transfer.

Features:
- QR Code Pairing: Scan to instantly share files between devices
- Encrypted Transfer: Files are encrypted at rest on the server
- Auto-Expiry: Sessions self-destruct after your chosen duration
- Send & Receive: Upload files or generate a QR code to receive files
- Multi-Format: Images, documents, videos, archives, anything
- No Login Required: Zero accounts, start sharing immediately
QR Code Pairing for instant wireless sharing
No account required to send or receive
Instant, Private, and Seamless File Sharing via QR Code.
